# Gorgias

*[Plato](../philosophers/plato.md) · 380 BCE · *Γοργίας**

A dialogue in which Socrates confronts the rhetorician Gorgias, then Polus and Callicles, over the worth of rhetoric and the good life; he argues that it is better to suffer injustice than to commit it, against the thesis of the right of the stronger.
